title: Single LapTime rank feature within Race
summary: Add only LapTime percentile rank within Race as a small feature test.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Add one covariate-only feature: LapTime rank percentile within Race. If train and test are combined to compute this rank, ensure the target column is excluded and document it in a code comment. Do not add the broader race-relative block.
expected_effect: Recover a useful fragment of race-relative context without the broad block that underperformed.
risk: Single-feature effects may be too small or noisy.
